source_pr.title: pkg/executor,tests: reset params in the PipelineWindow.Open
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #53600 

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?
Before this commit:
``` shell
$ ./run-tests.sh -r executor/window
extracting statistics: s
building tidb-server binary: ./integrationtest_tidb-server
building portgenerator binary: ./portgenerator
building mysql-tester binary: ./mysql_tester
start tidb-server, log file: ./integration-test.out
tidb-server(PID: 56846) started
record result for case: "executor/window"
ERRO[0007] run test [executor/window] err: sql:select 1 from t_tjov where ( select t_tjov.c_tutmh1 as c0 from ( select nth_value(t_n.c_tf_us39fv, 1) over (partition by t_db8a.c_jr2kq78hqt order by t_n.c_mm8jnf) as c5 from t_db8a join t_n ) as tbl limit 1 );: run "select 1 from t_tjov where ( select t_tjov.c_tutmh1 as c0 from ( select nth_value(t_n.c_tf_us39fv, 1) over (partition by t_db8a.c_jr2kq78hqt order by t_n.c_mm8jnf) as c5 from t_db8a join t_n ) as tbl limit 1 );" at line 560 err Error 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [32] with length 32 

ERRO[0007] 1 tests failed                               
ERRO[0007] run test [executor/window] err: sql:select 1 from t_tjov where ( select t_tjov.c_tutmh1 as c0 from ( select nth_value(t_n.c_tf_us39fv, 1) over (partition by t_db8a.c_jr2kq78hqt order by t_n.c_mm8jnf) as c5 from t_db8a join t_n ) as tbl limit 1 );: run "select 1 from t_tjov where ( select t_tjov.c_tutmh1 as c0 from ( select nth_value(t_n.c_tf_us39fv, 1) over (partition by t_db8a.c_jr2kq78hqt order by t_n.c_mm8jnf) as c5 from t_db8a join t_n ) as tbl limit 1 );" at line 560 err Error 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [32] with length 32 
```

After this commit:
No error reported

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test

  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Reset the parameters in the Open method of pipelinedwindow to avoid unexpected errors caused by repeated open and close operations when pipelinedwindow is used as a child node of apply, which prevents reusing previous parameter values.
```

symptoms: Integration test hit intermittent panic: `runtime error: index out of range [32] with length 32` when `PipelinedWindowExec` was opened/closed repeatedly (e.g., under apply) and reused stale internal state.
failure_signature: Error 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [32] with length 32 (executor/window)
root_cause_explanation: `PipelinedWindowExec` can be opened/closed multiple times when used as a child executor (e.g., under apply). Before this PR, `Open()` did not fully reset all internal state/parameters, so a subsequent execution could reuse stale indices/counters from a previous run and trigger out-of-bounds access (`index out of range`). The fix resets all relevant fields in `Open()` so each execution starts from a clean state and no stale state leaks across opens.
fix_pattern: Reset executor internal state on every `Open()` (especially for executors that may be reopened/reused under apply) to avoid stale-state reuse and intermittent panics.

evidence: evidence: order by c0, c1, c2 desc (tests/integrationtest/r/executor/window.result)

Changed files (4): pkg/executor/builder.go, pkg/executor/pipelined_window.go, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/window.result, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/window.test

Picked test: type=integration path=tests/integrationtest/r/executor/window.result name=window
